objective: PS1/N64 retro material pipeline — vertex jitter + color banding on all 3D meshes
checkpoint: Enhanced ps1_material.gdshader with temporal vertex jitter, clip-space snapping, UV quantization, 15-bit color banding. Created BrocRetroMaterials module. Per-asset jitter: megaliths 0.001, trees 0.003, creatures 0.008. Wired into BroceliandeForest3D. 3 files changed, 176 insertions.
